name: Spektrix Arts and Venue Management REST API
what_it_does: Spektrix arts and venue management REST API for theatres, arts centres, concert halls, museums, and cultural organizations to manage ticket sales, customer relationships, fundraising, memberships, and marketing — enabling automated box office operations, supporter management, and audience development through Spektrix's cloud-based arts ticketing and CRM platform serving 500+ arts organizations across the UK, US, Ireland, and Canada. Enables AI agents to manage event for performance and event catalogue management automation, handle ticket for seat reservation and booking automation, access customer for arts patron CRM and contact management automation, retrieve membership for arts subscriber and member management automation, manage fundraising for donation and appeal campaign automation, handle marketing for audience segment and campaign automation, access reporting for box office analytics and audience insight automation, retrieve basket for online checkout session management automation, manage pricing for dynamic pricing and offer management automation, and integrate Spektrix with payment processors, email platforms, and venue access control systems for arts organization operations automation.
use_cases: Automating ticket sales and seat reservations for theatre box office operations automation agents
Managing arts patron CRM records for audience development and relationship management automation agents
Processing memberships and subscriptions for performing arts organization automation agents
Accessing box office analytics for arts venue performance reporting and marketing automation agents
not_for: Sports or music festival ticketing (Spektrix is specifically for arts and cultural sector, not sports/concerts)
General e-commerce (Spektrix is arts ticketing and fundraising, not general retail)
Large-scale stadium events (Spektrix serves medium-sized arts organizations, not stadium-scale events)
best_when: A theatre, arts centre, concert hall, or museum wanting AI agents to automate ticket sales, manage patron relationships, process memberships, and access box office analytics through Spektrix's arts-sector-specific platform.
avoid_when: ARTS SECTOR FOCUS: Spektrix is purpose-built for arts and cultural organizations; automated general-events assumption creates arts-specific data model constraints; automated must understand Spektrix's arts-centric CRM and ticketing concepts. SPEKTRIX CUSTOMER ONLY: API requires active Spektrix subscription; automated developer access assumption creates customer_account_required; automated must be a Spektrix customer to access API. CUSTOM ATTRIBUTES VARY: Each Spektrix customer can configure custom customer and event attributes; automated uniform schema assumption creates custom_attribute_not_found; automated must understand each organization's specific Spektrix configuration. GDPR CONSENT MANAGEMENT: Arts patron data is subject to GDPR/data protection; automated unrestricted patron data access assumption creates consent_required for non-consented patron contact; automated must implement Spektrix consent management for patron communications.

auth.notes: Spektrix uses API key + OAuth2 for arts management REST API. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2007. Products: Box office, CRM, memberships, fundraising, marketing, reporting. SDKs: None public. 500+ arts organizations. UK, US, Ireland, Canada. Cloud-native. Privately held. Competes with Tessitura for arts sector CRM and ticketing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for arts organizations; production requires Spektrix subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription based on organization size and ticketing volume; implementation services
pricing.notes: London UK. Privately held. Annual subscription. 500+ arts organizations. UK/US/IE/CA.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; box office and CRM APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: BASKET-BASED CHECKOUT: Spektrix online sales use basket model; automated direct-ticket-purchase assumption creates basket_required for online sales; automated must create basket, add tickets, and complete basket through Spektrix checkout flow

SEATING PLAN VARIES BY VENUE: Each Spektrix venue has unique seating configurations; automated uniform seating assumption creates venue-specific_seat_map requirement; automated must retrieve venue-specific seating plan before seat selection

MEMBERSHIP RULES ARE COMPLEX: Spektrix membership benefits (discounts, priority booking) have complex rule configurations; automated simple membership assumption creates benefit_not_applied for misconfigured membership benefit flows; automated must understand each organization's membership configuration

CUSTOMER DEDUPLICATION IS REQUIRED: Arts organizations care about patron data quality; automated always-create-new assumption creates duplicate_patron records; automated must implement customer search-before-create to prevent patron duplication

CONSENT FIELDS ARE MANDATORY: GDPR consent for marketing must be captured; automated consent-omission assumption creates GDPR_consent_missing for patron records; automated must capture explicit marketing consent at patron creation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Arts venue management. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key + OAuth2. UK/EU. Patron CRM and ticket data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Arts venue management. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key + OAuth2. UK/EU. Arts patron and ticket data.
